task: Search for a beginner’s course in computer science that includes advertisement skills.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the search on Coursera and identified a course page that matches the requested constraints as represented by the site’s own filters/results. Evidence shows the agent applied Topic: Computer Science, Level: Beginner, and Skill: Advertising, yielding 8 results. It then opened and verified the course page for “How to find audience interests with Meta Business Suite” at https://www.coursera.org/projects/how-to-find-audience-interests-with-meta-business-suite. On that page, the breadcrumb shows “Computer Science > Algorithms,” the level is explicitly “Beginner,” and the skills include “Advertising,” “Advertising Campaigns,” “Online Advertising,” plus related technical/data skills like “Social Media Analytics,” “Data Import/Export,” and “Business Metrics.” The final answer accurately reports the title, provider, level, type, duration, link, and relevant skills.
final_result_response:
Verified on the course page.

**Recommended course:** How to find audience interests with Meta Business Suite  
**Provider:** Coursera  
**Category:** Computer Science > Algorithms  
**Level:** Beginner  
**Type:** Guided Project  
**Duration:** 1 hour  
**Link:** https://www.coursera.org/projects/how-to-find-audience-interests-with-meta-business-suite

**Relevant skills:** Advertising, Advertising Campaigns, Online Advertising, Social Media Analytics, Data Import/Export, Business Metrics, Target Audience.

This is the best match I found among the filtered beginner Computer Science results with Advertising skills.
action_history: Opening Coursera: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.coursera.org/');
Searching Coursera: await page.locator('e9').fill('computer science advertising beginner');
Expanding topic and skills filters: await page.locator('e230').click();
Applying Computer Science filter: await page.locator('e259').click();
Looking for skills filter: await page.locator('e233').click();
Searching skills for advertising: await page.locator('e280').fill('advertising');
Viewing filtered course results: await page.locator('e240').click();
Checking Computer Science Fundamentals option: await page.locator('e326').click();
Filtering for core computer science skill: await page.locator('e363').click();
Opening stronger advertising-tech match: await page.locator('e336').click();

Opening corrected filtered results: const p2 = await openTab('https://www.coursera.org/search?query=computer+science+advertising+beginner&topic=computer-science&skillNames=Advertising&difficulty=beginner');
Opening filter dialog again: await page.locator('e31').click();
Selecting Computer Science topic: await page.locator('e232').click();
